ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the passenger survived */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "siblings_spouses_aboard" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parents_children_aboard" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "lifeboat" TEXT /* Lifeboat number if survived */,
  "body_number" TEXT /* Body number if did not survive */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES ticket_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "factor" TEXT /* Factor by which survival is categorized (e.g., class, gender) */,
  "survived_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers who survived */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Survival rate */,
  "survival_rate_percentage" REAL /* Survival rate as a percentage */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the ticket class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ticket class */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range for the class */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the class */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "related_passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related passenger */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., sibling, spouse) */,
  "relation_description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_relations_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_relations_related_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin assignment */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number assigned to the passenger */,
  "deck_level" INTEGER /* Deck level of the cabin */,
  "cabin_size" TEXT /* Size of the cabin */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of the cabin (e.g., single, double) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_assignments_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation" (
  "embarkation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the embarkation port */,
  "embarkation_date" TEXT /* Date of embarkation */,
  "embarkation_time" TEXT /* Time of embarkation */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embarkation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_embarkation_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disembarkation" (
  "disembarkation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disembarkation event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the disembarkation port */,
  "disembarkation_date" TEXT /* Date of disembarkation */,
  "disembarkation_time" TEXT /* Time of disembarkation */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disembarkation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disembarkation_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
